title: Accommodation import — async extraction path for slow/blocked sources (SPEC-277 R3)

tasks.title: Add async import Zod schemas
tasks.description:
Add three Zod schemas to accommodation-import.schema.ts: AccommodationImportAsyncStartResponseSchema {runId, datasetId, source: ImportSource, startedAt: ISO string}; AccommodationImportStatusQuerySchema (same 4 fields, since the client echoes the full 202 payload back); AccommodationImportStatusResponseSchema as a discriminated union on `settled` — settled:false, or settled:true with either draft-shaped fields (reuse AccommodationImportResponseSchema) or failureCode. Export inferred types.

Test requirements: unit tests in packages/schemas covering valid/invalid parse cases for each schema (missing fields, wrong enum value, malformed ISO date, both settled:true variants).

subtasks.title: Define AccommodationImportAsyncStartResponseSchema
Define AccommodationImportStatusQuerySchema
Define AccommodationImportStatusResponseSchema (discriminated union)
Export inferred TS types
Write schema unit tests

tasks.title: Add ApifyRunStatus to ImportFailureCode mapping helper
tasks.description:
Create mapApifyRunStatusToFailureCode(status: ApifyRunStatus): ImportFailureCode | null in a new file packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation-import/adapters/apify-run-status-mapping.ts. Map TIMED-OUT -> 'timeout', FAILED -> 'provider_error', ABORTED -> 'provider_error'; return null for READY/RUNNING/SUCCEEDED. Add JSDoc explaining Apify has no native 'blocked' run status, so this mapping never returns 'source_blocked' (that's only inferred from a start-time HTTP 429, handled elsewhere).

Test requirements: unit tests, one case per ApifyRunStatus value (6 total), asserting the exact mapping.

subtasks.title: Implement mapApifyRunStatusToFailureCode
Add JSDoc documenting the no-native-blocked-signal limitation
Write unit tests for all 6 ApifyRunStatus values

tasks.title: Extend ImportSourceAdapter interface for async mode
tasks.description:
Extend the ImportSourceAdapter interface (or add a sibling type) in adapter.types.ts with an optional extractAsync?(input): Promise<{runId: string; datasetId: string} | {failureCode: ImportFailureCode}> method, used only by adapters that support the async path (Airbnb, Booking). Keep the existing extract() untouched for all adapters. Add a type guard supportsAsyncExtraction(adapter) for the orchestrator/route to check.

Test requirements: unit tests exercising the type guard against a mock sync-only adapter and a mock async-capable adapter, verifying it narrows correctly.

subtasks.title: Add extractAsync? to ImportSourceAdapter interface
Add supportsAsyncExtraction type guard
Write unit tests for the type guard

tasks.title: Create startApifyRun retry wrapper for R1
tasks.description:
Add startApifyRunWithRetry(input: StartApifyRunInput): Promise<StartApifyRunResult | null> in a new file adapters/start-apify-run-with-retry.ts, wrapping SPEC-250's startApifyRun with the same retry shape as with-retry.ts (maxRetries=2, jittered backoff, baseDelayMs=500) adapted to startApifyRun's null-on-failure contract: retry when the result is null, give up after 3 total attempts and return null. Do not modify with-retry.ts (it stays scoped to the sync path).

Test requirements: unit tests — succeeds on first try, succeeds after 1-2 nulls, gives up after 3 nulls, asserts backoff delay is jittered and increasing.

subtasks.title: Implement startApifyRunWithRetry with 3-attempt jittered backoff
Retry only on null result (transient failure)
Write unit tests for success-first-try and retry-then-succeed
Write unit test for exhausted-retries and backoff jitter

tasks.title: Implement resolveImportRunStatus running/succeeded branches
tasks.description:
Implement resolveImportRunStatus({token, runId, datasetId, source}) in a new file adapters/resolve-import-run-status.ts: calls getApifyRunStatus; READY/RUNNING -> {settled: false}; SUCCEEDED -> call getApifyDatasetItems, map the first item to RawExtraction using the same per-source item mapper the sync path already uses, return {settled: true, raw}. Empty dataset -> {settled: true, failureCode: 'nothing_found'}. getApifyRunStatus returning null (unreachable) -> {settled: true, failureCode: 'provider_error'}.

Test requirements: unit tests for running->not-settled, succeeded-with-items->raw, succeeded-empty->nothing_found, status-null->provider_error.

subtasks.title: Implement running/not-settled branch
Implement succeeded+items -> RawExtraction branch
Implement succeeded+empty -> nothing_found branch
Implement unreachable(null) -> provider_error branch
Write unit tests for all 4 branches

tasks.title: Extend resolveImportRunStatus with terminal-failure branch and R2 fallback
tasks.description:
Extend resolve-import-run-status.ts to handle FAILED/TIMED-OUT/ABORTED: map via mapApifyRunStatusToFailureCode (T-002). If the code is 'source_blocked' or 'provider_error' AND source is airbnb/booking, call the existing _runFallbackGenericExtract orchestrator step verbatim; accept the fallback only if it yields name/summary/imageUrls (same rule as sync R2), returning {settled: true, raw} on success or {settled: true, failureCode} otherwise. For 'timeout', skip fallback entirely.

Test requirements: unit tests for FAILED->fallback-succeeds, FAILED->fallback-insufficient, TIMED-OUT->timeout-no-fallback-attempted, ABORTED->fallback.

subtasks.title: Map terminal failure statuses via T-002's helper
Trigger R2 fallback on source_blocked/provider_error for airbnb/booking
Apply existing fallback-acceptance rule
Skip fallback for 'timeout'
Write unit tests for all 4 terminal scenarios

tasks.title: Add async extraction mode to Airbnb adapter
tasks.description:
Implement AirbnbAdapter.extractAsync() (from T-003's interface): same credential checks as the existing extract() (missing apifyToken/apifyAirbnbActor -> {failureCode: 'credentials_missing'}), then call startApifyRunWithRetry (T-004) with the same actor input the sync path builds today; success -> {runId, datasetId}; retry-exhaustion (null) -> {failureCode: 'provider_error'}. The existing extract() is untouched.

Test requirements: unit tests for missing-credentials->credentials_missing, success->run-handle, retry-exhausted->provider_error.

subtasks.title: Implement extractAsync() with existing credential checks
Call startApifyRunWithRetry with the existing actor input builder
Map retry-exhaustion to provider_error
Write unit tests for the 3 outcomes

tasks.title: Add async extraction mode to Booking adapter
tasks.description:
Implement BookingAdapter.extractAsync(): reuse the existing free JSON-LD-first logic unchanged; only when JSON-LD is sparse/blocked (the same condition that today triggers the sync Apify fallback), call startApifyRunWithRetry (T-004) instead of runApifyActor and return {runId, datasetId} or {failureCode}. When JSON-LD alone is sufficient, extractAsync must not be used — the orchestrator (T-010) calls the existing sync extract() in that case. Document this precondition in JSDoc.

Test requirements: unit tests for JSON-LD-sparse->async-start-success, JSON-LD-sparse+missing-credentials, JSON-LD-sparse+retry-exhausted.

subtasks.title: Implement extractAsync() reusing existing JSON-LD-sparse detection
Call startApifyRunWithRetry only on the Apify-fallback branch
Document the 'only call when async is needed' precondition
Write unit tests for the 3 outcomes

tasks.title: Extract finalizeImportDraft reusable post-extraction pipeline
tasks.description:
Refactor the existing inline post-raw-extraction steps (mapRawToDraft, amenity resolution, destination hint, media hints — currently steps 4+ of importFromUrl) in accommodation-import.service.ts into an exported finalizeImportDraft(raw: RawExtraction, ctx): AccommodationImportResponse-shaped result, with no behavior change for the existing synchronous flow. Lets the async status route (T-011) reuse identical draft-building logic instead of duplicating it.

Test requirements: the full existing importFromUrl test suite must pass unchanged (regression); add direct unit tests calling finalizeImportDraft in isolation with a fixed RawExtraction fixture.

subtasks.title: Extract steps 4+ into exported finalizeImportDraft function
Call it from the existing sync importFromUrl flow unchanged
Run full existing test suite to confirm no regression
Write direct unit tests for finalizeImportDraft in isolation

tasks.title: Modify import-from-url route to dispatch 202 for async sources
tasks.description:
After the orchestrator resolves the matching adapter, branch: if it's Airbnb, or Booking on its Apify-fallback condition, call extractAsync() (T-007/T-008) instead of extract(); on a run-handle result, respond ctx.json({runId, datasetId, source, startedAt}, 202), bypassing the route factory's 200/201 typing (same bypass as accommodation-external-reputation/protected/refresh.ts); on a failureCode result, fall through to the existing synchronous failure response unchanged. All other sources keep returning 200 exactly as today.

Test requirements: fast source stays 200 (regression), Airbnb-with-creds returns 202 with expected shape, Airbnb-missing-creds still returns 200 sync-failure, Booking-JSON-LD-sufficient stays 200.

subtasks.title: Branch to extractAsync() for Airbnb / Booking-Apify-fallback
Return 202 with run handle via the ctx.json bypass pattern
Preserve existing 200 flow for all other sources/branches
Write route tests for the 4 scenarios

tasks.title: Create GET import-from-url status polling route
tasks.description:
New GET route (modeled on reputation-status.ts) validating query params via T-001's status-query schema. If now - startedAt exceeds the existing apifyTimeoutMs config, short-circuit to {settled: true, failureCode: 'timeout'} without calling Apify again. Otherwise call resolveImportRunStatus (T-005/T-006); on {settled:true, raw}, pass raw through finalizeImportDraft (T-009); on {settled:true, failureCode}, return it directly; on {settled:false}, return as-is. Register the route in the accommodation route index.

Test requirements: route tests for running->not-settled, succeeded->draft-shaped-response, failure->failureCode, ceiling-exceeded->timeout with no Apify call made (assert mock not invoked).

subtasks.title: Add the new GET route and register it
Enforce the apifyTimeoutMs poll ceiling before calling Apify
Call resolveImportRunStatus and finalizeImportDraft on success
Write route tests for the 4 scenarios

tasks.title: Build web import-status polling hook
tasks.description:
Adapt use-reputation-status.ts's hand-rolled setInterval pattern into useImportStatus({runId, datasetId, source, startedAt, enabled}) in a new file apps/web/src/hooks/use-import-status.ts: polls the status route every 5s while enabled and not settled, exposes {data, isPolling, error}; stops on settle, unmount, or a hard 4xx/5xx (transient network errors are swallowed and retried silently, same as the reputation hook).

Test requirements: use-import-status.test.ts — polling starts when enabled, stops on settle, stops on unmount (no state update after unmount), halts on hard error; use fake timers to assert the 5s interval.

subtasks.title: Implement useImportStatus adapting the use-reputation-status.ts pattern
Stop polling on settle/unmount/hard-error
Swallow and retry transient network errors silently
Write hook tests (fake timers) for all 4 stop conditions

tasks.title: Wire ImportFromUrl.client.tsx to the async polling flow
tasks.description:
When importFromUrl responds 202, switch to polling mode via useImportStatus (T-012) instead of resolving immediately; keep the existing 'Importando...' spinner button state active throughout polling. On settle: success calls onImported?.() exactly as today; failure renders the existing i18n error-banner keyed by failureCode, unchanged. 200 responses (unchanged sources) behave identically to today.

Test requirements: component tests — 200-response path unchanged (regression), 202->poll->settle-success calls onImported, 202->poll->settle-failure shows the error banner, unmount/cancel mid-poll doesn't update state after unmount.

subtasks.title: Detect 202 response and switch to polling mode via useImportStatus
Keep spinner active during polling
Handle settle-success (onImported) and settle-failure (error banner)
Write component tests for the 4 scenarios

tasks.title: Build admin import-status query hook
tasks.description:
Add a TanStack Query hook in a new file apps/admin/src/features/accommodations/hooks/useAccommodationImportStatusQuery.ts, modeled on useCronJobsQuery's refetchInterval pattern: useQuery keyed by {runId, datasetId, source}, enabled only when a run handle is present, refetchInterval: (query) => query.state.data?.settled ? false : 5000.

Test requirements: hook tests — query is disabled without a run handle, refetchInterval keeps polling while unsettled, refetchInterval returns false once settled (mirrors useCronJobsQuery test patterns).

subtasks.title: Implement useAccommodationImportStatusQuery with conditional refetchInterval
Gate the query on presence of a run handle
Write hook tests for enabled/disabled and interval-stop-on-settle

tasks.title: Wire ImportFromUrlSection.tsx to the async polling flow
tasks.description:
On a 202 mutation response, store the run handle and switch to T-014's status query instead of resolving the mutation immediately; keep the existing LoaderIcon spin active during polling. Defer the existing setFieldValue prefill logic until the status query reports settled:true with a draft; unchanged failureCode error-banner path on settled failure. 200 responses behave exactly as today.

Test requirements: component tests — 200-response path unchanged (regression), 202->poll->settle-success prefills the form fields, 202->poll->settle-failure shows the error banner, mutation.isPending vs polling-in-progress are visually distinguished.

subtasks.title: Detect 202 response and switch to the status-query polling flow
Keep loader spin active during polling
Defer field prefill until settled:true with a draft
Write component tests for the 4 scenarios

tasks.title: Write integration tests for the full async 202+poll route contract
tasks.description: New test file (matching the existing test-dir convention) with end-to-end route-level tests mocking the Apify HTTP layer (not resolveImportRunStatus internals): Airbnb start->poll-running->poll-succeeded happy path returning a draft; Booking JSON-LD-sparse->async->succeeded; poll-ceiling-exceeded returns failureCode 'timeout' without a further Apify call; FAILED->provider_error->R2-fallback-success returns a draft; FAILED->provider_error->R2-fallback-insufficient surfaces the failureCode. Assert response shapes match the T-001 schemas exactly.

subtasks.title: Test Airbnb start->running->succeeded happy path
Test Booking JSON-LD-sparse->async->succeeded
Test poll-ceiling-exceeded->timeout with no further Apify call
Test FAILED->fallback-success and FAILED->fallback-insufficient

tasks.title: Write regression tests for the unchanged synchronous contract
tasks.description: Add or verify test cases confirming Google Places / MercadoLibre / Generic sources, and Booking's JSON-LD-sufficient branch, still return 200 with the exact response shape they had before this feature — no 202, no polling, no behavior change. Run against the modified route (T-010) to catch any accidental regression in the dispatch branching.

subtasks.title: Add/verify 200-response regression tests for Google Places, MercadoLibre, Generic
Add/verify 200-response regression test for Booking JSON-LD-sufficient

tasks.title: Run cross-cutting client polling UX regression pass
tasks.description: Run the full web + admin test suites scoped to ImportFromUrl / ImportFromUrlSection and their new hooks (T-012/T-013/T-014/T-015), confirm no flakiness from fake-timer usage in the polling tests, and fix any coverage gaps surfaced (e.g. a missed unmount-cleanup case). Verification/hardening task — only touch files if a real gap is found.

subtasks.title: Run full web test suite for the import polling feature, review for flakiness
Run full admin test suite for the import polling feature, review for flakiness
Fix any coverage gaps found

tasks.title: Document the new async import contract
tasks.description: Document the 202+poll contract shape (start response, status response, poll interval, apifyTimeoutMs ceiling) in apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md or a new short doc under docs/guides/, and explicitly call out that the async path triggers the R2 Generic fallback on both 'source_blocked' and 'provider_error' (diverging from the sync path's source_blocked-only trigger, since Apify's run status has no native 'blocked' signal) — so a future reader doesn't 'fix' this back. Add JSDoc to resolveImportRunStatus, finalizeImportDraft, and the status route handler.

subtasks.title: Document the 202+poll contract shape and poll ceiling
Document the source_blocked/provider_error R2-fallback divergence rationale
Add JSDoc to resolveImportRunStatus, finalizeImportDraft, and the status route handler
